---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Forge skills, agents, or templates
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Install skill / load agent definition / use template '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or unexpected output.

## Environment

- **Claude Code version**: (e.g., 1.0.12)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Shell**: (e.g., bash, zsh)
- **Forge version/commit**: (e.g., main branch, commit abc123)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Screenshots, logs, or links to related issues are helpful.
